expectations.text: [defect_replay][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: missing scenario generation for template-save and report-builder loading
expectations.evidence: The output explicitly covers the case focus in multiple places, e.g. in the header: "Focus: *missing scenario generation for template-save and report-builder loading*" and in the benchmark-specific section: "This benchmark specifically expects Phase 4a to generate scenarios that cover: 1. Template-save gaps ... 2. Report-builder loading gaps". It also ties to concrete defects (BCIN-7669, BCIN-7727) and provides "Minimal Phase 4a scenario additions required" for both focus areas.

expectations.text: [defect_replay][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase4a
expectations.evidence: The output is explicitly Phase-4a framed and contract-referenced: it states "Primary phase/checkpoint under test: Phase 4a" and includes a section "What Phase 4a must demonstrate (contract-aligned)" citing `phase4a-contract.md` requirements (subcategory-only, atomic action chains, observable verification leaves, no top-layer groupings). It evaluates alignment in "Benchmark expectation check (Phase 4a alignment)" and provides Phase 4a-style scenario additions (subcategory-first with action chains + verification leaves).
